## Stop Settling for Good Enough

Optimize the risk-reward equation and bring identity-based insights into your fraud operations. Benefit from Sift’s AI-powered fraud decisioning platform, 42 patented data techniques like Clearbox Decisioning and ThreatClusters, and 1 trillion annual data events derived from hundreds of digital brands.

## Where AI Meets IP

With 40+ patents and counting, we’ve diligently documented our matchup against digital fraud, building an ongoing source of trust for every business in our network.

![phone-in-handd](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20581%20463'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Proven Science, on the Record

Our Workflow’s capability allows fraud and risk teams to automate and manage their business fraud logic within the Sift Console. Along with WatchTower, an internal capability that detects anomalies in customer traffic and fraud decision patterns, businesses using Sift add AI-powered risk decisioning into every element of operations.

learn more

40+ Patents

## Delivering Trust TOGETHER

Working alongside our community of global partners, Sift delivers essential fraud-fighting and revenue-generating technology to customers.
